text.title: SDD Workflows Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of SDD Workflows.

example.scenario: Project publishes workflows.json with 4 workflows. impl-workflow has inputs=[design.md, impl-plan.md], outputs=[code, task-logs], agents=[opus-orchestrator, sonnet-workers], gate=L5-review.
